get.description:
Get information about a specific ChromaDB collection.

Requires collection or admin authentication.

Args:
    collection_name: Name of the collection

Returns:
    Collection info including embedding count

patch.description:
Update collection metadata (description, authentication requirement).

Requires collection or admin authentication.

Args:
    collection_name: Name of the collection
    description: New description for the collection
    requires_auth: Set whether authentication is required (True/False)
    regenerate_token: If true, regenerate the access token for this collection (invalidates old token)

Returns:
    Updated collection info

parameters.name: requires_auth

schema.description: Set whether authentication is required for this collection
schema.title: Requires Auth

parameters.description: Set whether authentication is required for this collection

parameters.name: regenerate_token

schema.description: If true, regenerate the access token for this collection (invalidates old token)
schema.title: Regenerate Token

parameters.description: If true, regenerate the access token for this collection (invalidates old token)

schema.description: Custom personality system prompt for RAG responses (empty string to clear)
schema.title: System Prompt

post.description:
Create a new ChromaDB collection for storing document embeddings.

Requires admin authentication.
Returns an access token that must be saved - it's needed for document and query operations.
If requires_auth is False, the collection can be accessed without authentication.

Args:
    collection_name: Name of the collection to create
    description: Optional description for the new collection
    requires_auth: Whether authentication is required (default: True)

Returns:
    Created collection info with access token (token is None if requires_auth=False)

parameters.name: description

schema.description: Optional description for the new collection
schema.title: Description

parameters.description: Optional description for the new collection

parameters.name: requires_auth

schema.description: Whether authentication is required for this collection
schema.title: Requires Auth

parameters.description: Whether authentication is required for this collection

schema.description: Custom personality system prompt for RAG responses
schema.title: System Prompt

delete.description:
Delete a ChromaDB collection.

Requires admin authentication.
Cannot delete the default collection.
Use force=true to delete non-empty collections.

Args:
    collection_name: Name of the collection to delete
    force: If true, delete even if collection has embeddings

Returns:
    Deletion confirmation with count of removed embeddings

parameters.name: force

schema.description: Force deletion even if collection contains embeddings
schema.title: Force

parameters.description: Force deletion even if collection contains embeddings

get.description:
List all available ChromaDB collections.

Requires admin authentication.

Returns:
    List of collections with their info

List all PDF documents in a collection.

Requires collection access token or admin token.

Args:
    collection_name: Collection to list documents from (default: from settings)

Returns:
    List of document filenames

schema.title: Response Get Documents Info Documents Info Get

post.description:
Upload a new PDF document for processing.

Requires collection access token or admin token.

Args:
    file: PDF file to upload
    collection_name: Target collection for embeddings (default: from settings)

Returns:
    Job status with job_id for tracking

put.description:
Replace an existing document and reindex it.

Requires collection access token or admin token.

Args:
    file: PDF file to upload
    collection_name: Target collection for embeddings (default: from settings)

Returns:
    Job status with job_id for tracking

post.description:
Import a pre-processed document (PDF + result JSON) without running the full pipeline.

Only Docling runs for visual asset extraction (page/image/table PNGs).
Text chunks, summary, TOC, and embeddings are restored from the result JSON.

Requires collection access token or admin token.

Args:
    document: PDF file to import
    result: Result JSON file (as produced by the processing pipeline)
    collection_name: Target collection (default: from settings)

Returns:
    Import summary with counts

delete.description:
Delete a document and all its embeddings.

Requires collection access token or admin token.

Args:
    document_name: Name of document to delete
    collection_name: Collection to delete embeddings from (default: from settings)

Returns:
    Deletion summary

get.description:
Get information about a document.

Requires collection access token or admin token.

Args:
    document_name: Name of document
    collection_name: Collection to check for embeddings (default: from settings)

Returns:
    Document information including status and counts

Retrieve the processed result JSON for a document.

Requires collection access token or admin token.

Args:
    document_name: Name of document
    collection_name: Collection where the document is stored (default: from settings)

Returns:
    Processed document result

schema.title: Response Get Document Result Document Result  Document Name  Get

get.description:
Check the status of a document processing job.

Requires collection access token or admin token.

Args:
    job_id: Job identifier
    collection_name: Collection to search in (default: from settings)

Returns:
    Job status information

List processing jobs for a collection.

Requires collection access token or admin token.

Args:
    collection_name: Collection to filter jobs by (default: from settings)

Returns:
    List of job statuses

schema.title: Response List Jobs Document Jobs Get

get.description:
Dry-run parity check for a collection.

Compares S3 storage and ChromaDB embeddings and reports inconsistencies
without making any changes.

Requires admin token.

Args:
    collection_name: Collection to check

Returns:
    ParityReport with per-document parity status

post.description:
Check parity and auto-repair inconsistencies for a collection.

Actions taken:
- Documents with result JSON but missing embeddings: re-import embeddings from JSON
- Documents with embeddings but no result JSON: delete embeddings and S3 artifacts

Requires admin token.

Args:
    collection_name: Collection to repair

Returns:
    ParityReport with actions taken per document

Ask a question using RAG.

Requires collection access token or admin token.

Supports:
- Text queries or audio file uploads
- Session-based conversation history
- Multi-collection queries
- Source file filtering

Args:
    query: User query (text or audio file)
    session_id: Optional session ID for conversation continuity
    collection_name: Target collection to query (default: from settings)
    source_files: Optional comma-separated filenames to filter search
    
Returns:
    Generated response with sources and reasoning

get.description:
Retrieve speech synthesis audio by ID.

Args:
    id: Speech UUID from a previous /ask response
    
Returns:
    Audio stream in OGG format

Proxy file request from MinIO through FastAPI.

Requires collection access token or admin token (unless collection has auth disabled).

Args:
    file_path: Path to file in MinIO
    minio_client: MinIO client instance

Returns:
    Streaming file response
